  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Non-gas-rated thread sealant used on gas piping joints, creating a high risk of chemical degradation and subsequent gas leaks."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Disassemble the affected gas piping joints.",
    "Clean the threads thoroughly to remove all non-compliant sealant.",
    "Apply an approved, gas-rated thread sealant (such as yellow PTFE tape or gas-rated pipe joint compound) and reassemble.",
    "Perform a pressure/leak test on the reassembled piping."
  ],
  "rationale": "The use of a non-gas-rated thread sealant violates safety codes as it can degrade when exposed to fuel gases, leading to hazardous leaks. The joints must be disassembled, cleaned, and resealed with a compound or tape certified to resist the chemical action of liquefied petroleum or natural gas.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC Section 403.9.3 (Thread joint compounds)",
    "NFPA 54 Section 5.6.7.4 (Thread joint compounds)"
  ]
}
